metadata.description: Silent skill router for Claude Code — compares overlapping skills, caches decisions, and never asks twice

plugins.name: skill-arbiter
plugins.description: PRE-FLIGHT CHECK for every task with actionable verbs. Silently scans all available skills, detects overlaps, checks a decision cache, and only interrupts when multiple skills compete. Supports objective comparison (sample-based), GitHub stars, manual override, and parallel aggregation for search/audit tasks. Records every decision so the same task class never pays comparison cost twice.
